_about: Curated real past-IPO retail allotment ratios for back-checking the min(1, 1/retail_sub) proxy (v2 A3). retail_sub is the shares-based retail subscription multiple (NSE); actual_retail_allotment is the observed per-application allotment probability from the registrar's basis-of-allotment lottery ratio, NOT the circular 1/subscription figure many aggregators quote. Small by design — authoritative basis-of-allotment data is not cleanly machine-sourceable (Cloudflare / registrar PDFs); expand from IPOMatrix's basis-of-allotment tab (applies/allottees per category) when available. See docs/v2/A3_ALLOTMENT_ODDS.md.

rows.name: Tata Technologies
rows.source: Published retail allotment matrix from the registrar basis-of-allotment; retail subscription 16.5x (NSE).

rows.name: Bajaj Housing Finance
rows.source: Business Today, citing the basis-of-allotment document; retail subscription 7.04x (NSE).
